result:
**Goal: Add a Tokamak Fusion Plasma Confinement simulation mode.**

A toroidal cross-section view of magnetically confined hydrogen plasma with particle-in-cell dynamics, magnetic field lines (toroidal + poloidal creating nested flux surfaces), plasma instabilities (kink modes, ELMs, sawteeth), energy balance tracking toward the Lawson criterion, neutral beam injection heating, turbulent transport across flux surfaces, and disruption events where confinement is lost. Three views: plasma density/temperature cross-section with magnetic topology, energy balance dashboard with Lawson triple-product tracking, and time-series sparklines. Six presets: Stable Ohmic Confinement, H-Mode Transition, Plasma Disruption, ITER-Scale Burning Plasma, Sawtooth Oscillations, Runaway Electron Beam.

Fusion energy is the defining scientific challenge of the era, it produces spectacular visuals (glowing plasma, swirling field lines, instability cascades), and it fills a gap — the project has no nuclear/plasma-confinement physics despite having 171 modes spanning nearly every other domain.
